public_contract_evidence: required function name and public assert arities
source_ast_observables: expected name absent; exactly one compatible top-level function
safety_guards: valid identifiers; unique function; arity compatible; expected name unbound; parse after alias
ambiguities: candidate function may still be semantically wrong
regression_risk: low syntax/packaging risk; observed functional rescue may remain zero

public_contract_evidence: no hidden tests or answers; source/AST only
source_ast_observables: known stdlib module used as attribute while unbound and unimported
safety_guards: known stdlib allowlist; module unbound in all scopes; import-only edit; compile and full regression evaluation required
ambiguities: execution path may not reach use; dynamic bindings or shadowing may exist
regression_risk: medium; import can alter name resolution or hide deeper semantic failure

public_contract_evidence: generation metadata and parser diagnostics only
safety_guards: only deterministic token-level completion with unique closure; otherwise abstain
regression_risk: high unless repair is uniquely mechanical

public_contract_evidence: required function and arities from public assertions
source_ast_observables: required name present but observed signature incompatible, or missing name is ambiguous
safety_guards: no parameter reordering/default synthesis without public evidence; compile and regression evaluation required
ambiguities: parameter semantics cannot be inferred from arity alone
